name: news-summary
tagline: ClawHub (138★): This skill should be used when the user asks for news updates, daily briefings, or what's happening in the world. Fetches n
verdict: The voice-summary feature hard-requires an OpenAI key but gives zero guidance for a missing or bad one — it'll just break with no explanation. No version/changelog tracking, and no statement of what this skill should NOT be used for.

highlights.summary: Multiple external-dependency steps (four RSS feeds, OpenAI TTS call) with no mention anywhere of what to do if a feed is unreachable, malformed, or the TTS call fails/is unauthenti
Presents grouping-by-region vs grouping-by-topic as an open choice with no stated default or deciding condition, materially changing the output structure.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / exclusion language appears anywhere in the description or body.
